rule-stock-cannot-go-negative.description: Stock quantity cannot go below zero unless negative stock is explicitly allowed

rule-reorder-alert.description: Alert when stock falls below reorder point

rule-lot-required-for-tracked-products.description: Products configured with lot tracking require a lot number on every movement

rule-serial-unique-in-stock.description: Serial number must be unique across all stock items
rule-serial-unique-in-stock.condition: StockMovement.SerialNumber is unique when Product.SerialTracking === true

rule-adjustment-requires-reason.description: Stock adjustments must include a reason in Details
